channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Best and worst Super Bowl commercials of 2026 as rated by experts
item.description: Google and Pepsi were among the best ads of the Big Game, while Coinbase and ai.com got failing grades, according to one ranking.

item.title: Migrants languish in US detention centers facing dire conditions and prolonged waits
item.description: Prolonged detention has become more common in President Donald Trump’s second term, at least partly because a new policy generally prohibits immigrati...

item.title: WATCH: Lara Spencer and James Longman take on the Olympics
item.description: The pair show "GMA" viewers where the athletes are training during the Milan Cortina games.

item.title: WATCH: Super Bowl commercials with biggest buzz
item.description: This year’s Super Bowl ads reached an estimated 130 million viewers and ad expert and “On Brand” podcast host Donny Deutsch weighs in on celebrity use...

item.title: Trial against Meta in New Mexico focuses on dangers of child sexual exploitation on social media
Seahawks ride their stifling defense to dominant Super Bowl win over the Patriots
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks defeated the New England Patriots Sunday to win the 2026 Super Bowl.

item.title: Face the Nation: Omar, Vinograd, Krebs
item.description: Missed the second half of the show? The latest on...Dem. Rep. Ilhan Omar says that as the Trump administration has steamrolled forward with executive ...

item.title: WATCH: Bad Bunny brings Puerto Rico to Super Bowl halftime show
item.description: The star brought his native Puerto Rico to world stage by turning the Apple Music Super Bowl Halftime Show into a celebration of his roots and a multi...

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 9, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance the one you live in now? Here are the mortgage interest rates to know right now.

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads the Fifth, doesn't answer House panel's questions
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell invoked her Fifth Amendment right and refused to answer questions during a virtual appearance before the House Oversight Committee.

item.title: Latest on Nancy Guthrie abduction as mysterious case reaches 9th day
item.description: Savannah Guthrie's mother, Nancy, was reported missing Feb. 1.

item.title: Media tycoon Jimmy Lai sentenced to 20 years in Hong Kong
item.description: Lai was convicted in December on charges related to national security.

item.title: Investigation continues a week after Savannah Guthrie mother was reported missing
